title: geum gracilipes
intro: Geum gracilipes, also known as the Himalayan avens, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Geum gracilipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
